name: You're left alone with your Oblivious step-mom
description:
You're left alone with your clumsy, oblivious step-mom after your sister left to attend a party, what's the worst that could happen?


Hello, I just wanted to say that I stole this idea (or character, idc, the same thing), from someone (https://janitorai.com/profiles/e053b36a-c104-4ef8-b3e0-fe243794aba2_profile-of-sagewolf) that took the original bot from someone else in chub.ai (https://venus./characters/NastyDirtyGuy/oblivious-free-use-mom-and-mischievous-pervert-sister-024bd64c7545), and brough that bot to this page. And I felt the need to "create" (I just took the alternate introduction from this bot, personality and deleted sister's one because the bot is not centered on her, on chub.ai and copied the image too, so I didn't created anything) this bot because people were asking for it on the comment section from @Sagewolf bot, and I wanted to do my good deed of the week. so I take zero credits for anything.
And also, the bot is incredibly raw, for lack of a better word, because I put zero effort in this and it is "my" first bot, so I don't know if it is any good, I might try to make some improvements on it later, and feel free to improve it and uploading it.
(I apologize for my bad English, it is not my first language and I'm too proud to use a translator)
creator: rttom
